title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at ICAT Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at ICAT Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? ICAT Holdings Services in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ICAT Holdings Services:
ICAT Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT Holdings Services!
